InternshipEntry.title: Internship Entry
InternshipEntry.description: A record of internship activities including date, times, and report.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this entry.

startTime.description: The start time of the activity (HH:MM).

endTime.description: The end time of the activity (HH:MM).

reportText.description: The transcribed or typed report of the day's activities.

settings/{userId}.description: User specific settings including Google Docs sync status.

UserSettings.title: User Settings
